titleStmt.title: SII 22.547: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 547. (A.R. No. 547 of 1906) CHITTOOR DISTRICT, PUNGANUR TALUK, LAḌḌIGAM On the north wall of the prākāra of the Nīlakaṇṭēśvara temple

summary.p: This consists of three verses in Sanskrit and two in Tamil describing the fame and prowess of the Kēraḷa chief (or King) Adhikēndra Vyāmukhaśravaṇōjvala. His regal emblems of a parasol and a bow below it with what looking like chāmara (flywisk) flanking either side of it are engraved below the inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

p.hi: svastiśrī Āyuṣmannadhikēndramāna nilaya tvatkirttimugdhāmbudhau ttrailōkyam kalavōtapātramakhilammērurggu
ṭēṣu kaṭāyatē pariluḍanmēghāvalī pallavastatratyastanutē nirantaramiḷanmiyyāmatāmaryyamāi viraśrī laḷinatōyānamahita kṣmāpālacū
ḍāmaṇiśrēṇivāraṇa vāraṇa kramavidhā vāḷānasvāla drumaḥ śaśvattēdhikamāna śatru dhavaḷacphatrēndu bimbagraha rāhurbāhu rasamhya sāhasa nidhirmdhattā
ndharāmaṇḍalam śrīmat kēraḷa vamśabhūṣaṇa mitikhyātasya pṛdhvipatērvyāmuttaśravaṇōjvalasya mahatō jaitrāsu dhātrāsuca nissāṇōndhata bhīmanādamaniśanimma
tvā mahābhōgina śśrimattōsya vipakṣarāja bhujaṅgā nityā vināśaṅgatāḥ
p.seg: ceraṉatikaṉ tiruneṭumāl teṉtakaṭai viraṉ viṭukātaḻakiyāṉ pāraḷantu ceṅ
koṭupolac cilaiyai vaṭatikkaḷavuṅkaṅkoṭa veṭṭiṉāṉ kal metiṉi nirveṇṭil viṭukātaḻakiyāṉ kotil pukaḻatikaṉ koyāṟṟūrāti vaṭaviru
ṅ koḷiccarattil vaitta cilai mārpiliṭa viruṅkoḷa maṉṉaricaintu

div.p: Digital edition of SII 22.547 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
